calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 09:10am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant,Hai Chu Shum, appears in Pro Per. Respondent Discount Plumbing, Inc represented by Owner Juan Pardell, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR: Group 1) Work Contract; Building work Permit
EXHA: Group A) Plumbing Bill; 2nd Plumbing Bill

Witness(Respondent): Jason Wells, Field Supervisor.

09:35am

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Continued To May-10-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
